title: Pipeline and stage limitation in HubSpot Create Deal Node
symptom: The HubSpot Create Deal node does not fetch all deal stages from different pipelines, limiting the options available for selection.
applies_when: Trying to select deal stages from multiple pipelines
not_this_if: No need to select deal stages from other pipelines
root_cause: The native HubSpot node has a known limitation where it does not retrieve deal stages from all pipelines, which has been an unresolved issue for several years.
fix_steps: Use the HTTP Request node to directly interact with the HubSpot API.
Fetch the pipeline and deal stage information by replacing 'your_pipeline_id' and 'your_stage_id' with actual IDs from HubSpot.
agent_instruction: Switch to using the HTTP Request node to bypass the limitations of the HubSpot Create Deal node.
